name: linear-or-github-triage
description: Daily issue/PR triage across Linear + GitHub. Voice-callable: 'what changed in my issues today', 'draft my standup'. Requires LINEAR_API_KEY (Linear) and/or gh auth login (GitHub).
core_description: User-invocable: 'what changed in my issues today', 'draft my standup', 'what is on my plate'. Delegate to core via `work`. Queries Linear GraphQL (needs LINEAR_API_KEY) + gh search issues/prs (needs gh auth), triages into action-needed/in-progress/waiting/done, and either speaks a summary OR drafts a standup update copied to clipboard via pbcopy.
